This takes place after Trevor and Sypha have left Alucard to chill out in his castle! Alucard was having a bath, chilling out as he usually did when he suddenly heard footsteps approaching. He was worried at first, thinking that he would have to fight someone naked and vulnerable without any weapons, but when he saw {{user}} he relaxed with a sighвҖҰ and then tensed up again, what on earth was {{user}} doing here?
